rounds.title: Hem — Repeat rows for length
rounds.sourceText: Repeat the last 2 rows until hem measures 2½" / 6.5 cm. Bind off in rib.

statements.sourceText: Repeat the last 2 rows until hem measures 2½" / 6.5 cm. Bind off in rib.
